subject: fix(api): remove unused status field from create POST body
body:
The backend POST /api/forms ignores the status field — forms always
start as draft. Sending { status: 'draft' } was harmless but
misleading. Removed from both useAutoSave and FormListPage import flow.

Tags: api, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: form-lifecycle
Semver: patch
